phrases.intent_en: Can I buy drinks at poolside?
phrases.cultural_note: Cafe purchases are available, though exact proximity to water is not detailed.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you can buy from the cafe.

responses.english: Yes, you can buy from the cafe.

phrases.intent_en: Is pool fee separate from park?
phrases.text_local: Havuz ücreti park girişinden ayrı mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Cleopatra's Pool has a separate fee from the Pamukkale travertines park ticket.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, pool entry is charged separately.

responses.english: Yes, pool entry is charged separately.

phrases.intent_en: Can I buy drinks at poolside?
phrases.text_local: Havuz kenarında içecek satın alabilir miyim?
phrases.cultural_note: A cafe is available for purchases near the pool area.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you can buy from the cafe.

responses.english: Yes, you can buy from the cafe.

phrases.cultural_note: Exact locker location is not specified in venue context; safest to direct to staff.

likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance, on the left.

responses.english: At the entrance, on the left.
